calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-037 axis-a Phase 1 consumer-input distributions -- affective stream ON (supersedes V3-EXQ-620)
items.note: Root-cause fix for V3-EXQ-620 (/diagnose-errors via V3-EXQ-625, 2026-06-01). 620 returned pooled identically-zero consumer-input distributions and was read as 'axis (a) empirically unmeetable', which justified the axis-(b) sustained-threat env-curriculum plan. That zero reading was a CONFIG artifact, not a substrate finding: the measurement reads agent._current_latent.z_harm_a, which is None unless cfg.latent.use_affective_harm_stream=True. ARM_PHASE1_BASELINE sets gap4_operating=True -> build_config routed to REEConfig.goal_stream(), which never forwarded the SD-011 flags, so the AffectiveHarmEncoder was never instantiated and z_harm_a stayed None (every measured quantity read exactly 0.0). The env emits harm_obs_a and StepHarness threads it; only the config flag was off. Fix: build_config(env, arm, enable_affective_harm_stream=True) -- a guarded library opt-in in experiments/_lib/goal_pipeline_tier1.py (default False keeps every other gap4 caller bit-identical; passes limb_damage_enabled through so from_dims auto-sizes harm_obs_a_dim=7 for the limb-damage fishtank env). This re-run uses the axis-(a) BASELINE env (default ENV_FISHTANK_KWARGS, NO scheduled-hazard curriculum) with the stream live, to answer whether axis (b) was even necessary. Outcome TIED to axis-(a) acceptance gate (z_harm_a_norm zero_fraction < 1.0 in >=2/3 seeds) instead of the vacuous 'ran cleanly' gate. claim_ids=[] (pure-measurement substrate-readiness diagnostic; NOT load-bearing per claim_ids Accuracy Rule). Dry-run smoke PASS 2026-06-01T17:49Z: end-to-end without crash, z_harm_a now non-zero (pooled p70 ~0.329 vs old identical 0.0), manifest + emit_outcome sentinel written. Phase3-queue snapshot race hazard mitigation per REE_Working/CLAUDE.md (post-commit dropped-file check).

items.title: SD-037 axis-b Phase 1b consumer-input distributions, sustained threat -- affective stream ON (supersedes V3-EXQ-625)
items.note: Root-cause fix for V3-EXQ-625 (/diagnose-errors, 2026-06-01). 625 reported a vacuous headline PASS while acceptance_pass=false with z_harm_a_norm identically 0.0 across all 1027 ticks / 3 seeds -- even on the 17 external-hazard-event ticks in seed 42. The cause was NOT 'harm magnitude below the affective noise floor' (plan Section 5.1 hypothesis) but the same config defect as V3-EXQ-620: gap4_operating=True -> REEConfig.goal_stream() never enabled use_affective_harm_stream, so z_harm_a was None and every consumer-input quantity read exactly 0.0. Fix: build_config(env, arm, enable_affective_harm_stream=True) (guarded library opt-in; auto-sizes harm_obs_a_dim for the limb-damage env). Keeps the axis-(b) env overlay (SD-029 scheduled_external_hazard curriculum + hazard_harm 0.2 + proximity_harm_scale 0.2). Outcome now TIED to the substrate-readiness acceptance gate (Section 3.4: C1 curriculum firing 3/3 + C2 z_harm_a non-zero >=2/3 + C3 sustained windows >=2/3) instead of the vacuous 'ran cleanly' gate. claim_ids=[] (pure-measurement substrate-readiness diagnostic; NOT load-bearing per claim_ids Accuracy Rule). Dry-run smoke PASS 2026-06-01T17:48Z: end-to-end without crash, z_harm_a now non-zero (zero_fraction 0.0, max ~0.33; BLA/CeA receive signal), manifest + emit_outcome sentinel written. NOTE: governance must reassess whether axis-(b) was needed once V3-EXQ-620b (baseline, stream ON) reports. Phase3-queue snapshot race hazard mitigation per REE_Working/CLAUDE.md (post-commit dropped-file check).

items.title: Goal-pipeline developmental-window 4-arm dissociation -- HARNESS-FIXED (update_z_goal driven + P0 positive control)
items.note: Lettered iteration of V3-EXQ-626 (scientific question UNCHANGED; implementation was wrong). Per failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-626_2026-06-01.md, the 626 bespoke episode loop never called agent.update_z_goal(), so GoalState.update() was never reached and z_goal stayed at zero-init for every step of every arm -- making the manifest (ARM_A z_goal_norm_median 0.0; C2/C3 vacuously 'true' at 0<ceiling) a Class-1 harness/measurement failure, NOT a substrate formation regression (622 S0 PASS + 582a refute regression). 626a HARNESS FIX (only material change): (1) per-step goal feed -- _run_episode now calls agent.update_z_goal(benefit_exposure=body_state[11], drive_level=1-energy) every step in BOTH train (P0/P1) and frozen-eval (P2) paths, matching the V3-EXQ-622 shared runner goal_stream_stages_sd054._benefit_and_drive; (2) NEW P0 positive-control gate -- ARM_A P0 z_goal_norm_peak >= 0.1 on >=2/3 seeds (Stage-0 A0.2 threshold; 622 S0 got 0.281/0.439/0.342). The positive control is the adjudicating bit: PASS confirms 626's 'formation failure' was the missing call (harness bug) -> object-binding ladder Stage 1+; FAIL would contradict 622 S0 -> /failure-autopsy on GoalState.update. Axis criteria C2/C3/C4 are tagged trusted=false unless the positive control fires (they are differential criteria, vacuous under uniformly-zero z_goal -- exactly the 626 trap). overall_pass = P0 positive control AND C1 AND (C2 OR C3 OR C4) AND C5. Carries over 626's 4-arm grid (ARM_A formation-only / ARM_B drive-anneal 0.9->0.2 / ARM_C hazard-anneal 0.0->0.7 / ARM_D writer-frozen-during-transition), phase budget (P0 30 + P1 30 + P2 30, 200 steps/ep), use_dacc=True (dacc_weight=0.5), and C1-C5 acceptance code unchanged. claim_ids=[] (substrate-readiness/harness diagnostic; NOT load-bearing per CLAIM_IDS Accuracy Rule). Authored via /queue-experiment per goal_stream_repair_diagnostic_ladder_2026-06-01.md Deliverables F1/G. Dry-run smoke PASS 2026-06-01T16:46Z (12 cells end-to-end without crash; progress instrumentation ep N/60 + 12 verdict lines correct; validate_experiments AST OK; emit_outcome sentinel wired; z_goal now moves off zero -- non-zero P2 medians where 626 was uniformly 0.0, confirming the feed is wired). HAZARD NOTED (V3-EXQ-603d incident 2026-06-01T06:46Z): phase3-queue sync_daemon snapshot writer can drop pathspec-staged files between git-add and git-commit; post-commit dropped-file check verifies V3-EXQ-626a lands cleanly. Concurrent active sibling at queue time: IGW MECH-262 (foreign untracked experiments/v3_exq_598c_mech262_retest_scaffolded_sd054.py; pathspec-limited git add avoids sweep).

items.title: ARC-068 / MECH-320 Niv-vs-Salamone opportunity-cost-vs-effort-cost dissociation
items.note: ARC-068 (action.opportunity_cost_no_op_penalty) Niv-vs-Salamone discriminative test on MECH-320 w_passive implementation. EXP-0081 / EVB-0237 dispatch_mode=discriminative_pair. ARC-068 lit-pull R3 verdict 2026-05-16 preserves slot-level registration; implementation collapses into MECH-320. R4 verdict: ARC-068 must NOT collapse into MECH-258 / SD-032b dacc_effort_cost (Salamone & Correa 2003 dissociation). 4-arm design: ARM_0 baseline / ARM_1 vigor + Niv env / ARM_2 vigor + Salamone elevated-movement-cost env / ARM_3 baseline + Salamone env. Forced-vigor probe v_t_floor=0.05 implements V3-EXQ-549 prescribed fix (substrate fired correctly under V3-EXQ-547 readiness but EWMA path stuck at zero under default env config in 549; 549 reclassified non_contributory and routed forced-vigor follow-on). Pre-registered acceptance C1 Niv lift >= 0.03, C2 dissociation < 0.50, C3 gate_product >= 0.5, C4 informative-only no-op penalty. claim_ids=[MECH-320, ARC-068] with evidence_direction_per_claim. MECH-258 / SD-032b are foils dissociated from, NOT tested directly. 4-row interpretation grid in script docstring: PASS = ARC-068 supports; C2 FAIL = ARC-068 weakens (effort-cost collapse, surface supersession question to /governance); C1 FAIL + C3 PASS = /failure-autopsy; C3 FAIL = /diagnose-errors. Phase3-queue snapshot race hazard mitigation per REE_Working/CLAUDE.md (post-commit dropped-file check).
